examples: Ellis was a venal, sly man.
In Ghana and Cameroon this has allowed venal village chiefs to steal logging revenues.
Objective To find a simple, effective surgical method to deal with venal ulcer in lower limbs.
Here, the tax pain is the result of legislative sausage making at its most venal.
Crowded Haiti has long suffered from squabbling and venal politicians, extreme inequality and ecological stress.
